abstract: Operational blueprint for building reliable autonomous AI research harnesses. Use when designing agent systems that modify training code, optimize for time-bounded metrics, or require reversible, observable experiments. Use when user asks about autoresearch, autonomous training optimization, stable evaluation harnesses, or agent failure recovery.

source_article.title: How Karpathy's Autoresearch Works And What You Can Learn From It
source_article.author: @ManiClones
